column1: Next steps: what is the experience of students from a care background in education?
Supporting data table
Group variables: Response
Statistics: Proportion of respondents
Audience: 2022 applicants who shared that they were care-experienced in their UCAS application and were below the age of 25    Domicile: UK
Coverage: All survey respondents who agreed that the care experienced description applied to them
Survey responses are weighted to represent the entire sample population.
Percentages are rounded to the nearest whole number.
Question asked:
Why do you want to go to university or college? Please select all that apply.
Response
To help me pursue a particular career
Because I am passionate about the subject I want to study
To help me to get a better job
To earn more money in the future
To become more independent
Because it is expected of me
To experience uni life and have fun
To meet new people
Everyone else I know is going to uni
To help figure out what I want to do with my life
To be intellectually challenged
To get a qualification that is internationally recognised
To develop the essential skills needed in my career
A desire to move to a new town or city
Other (please specify)
